description_long: This is a single-story brick house with a dark, multi-hipped roof and a spacious, well-manicured lawn. The front facade features a prominent bay window and a covered porch supported by columns, adding architectural interest and curb appeal. The driveway curves toward a detached garage structure, which is connected to the main house by a covered breezeway. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with a mix of standard and bay window styles. The exterior walls are primarily red brick, complemented by white trim and dark roofing shingles. The overall design is reminiscent of a modern ranch-style suburban home, with practical entryways and a focus on horizontal lines.
description: A single-story brick house with a dark hipped roof, bay window, covered porch, and a detached garage connected by a breezeway. The house sits on a large green lawn with a curved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bay window, covered porch with columns, and main entryway.
description_view_1: View highlighting the garage, breezeway connection, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_2: Rear and side view showing the back of the garage, the breezeway, and the extended roofline.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the rear brick wall, smaller windows, and the expansive lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, and a prominent front door beneath an overhang
